textByHashes.dd0517ce89663e88d4305a0a580625f0608fbda8: Hello, my friend. Would you like me to show you the prices of logs?
textByHashes.98ed1af8aec71a2b06aeb32d4afedcaa0dae390f: Ah, yes. I'm from Shilo Village on Karamja, it's a style I've had since I was little.
textByHashes.25eac3ebe6d0f140e6bd7d37a489bc3d17babb58: This Grand Exchange! Isn't it marvellous! I've never seen anything like it in my life.
textByHashes.14f6944672f96170d03ccfa63e897a11730f6bc1: My people were saddened when I chose to leave home and travel here, but I hope to make some serious profit, then return to my tribe.
textByHashes.0891bd5e451f5497dd25625ab0c13d446baa0946: Logs! Of all kinds! That's my plan, at least. Living in the jungle as we do, my people understand exotic wood very well indeed.
textByHashes.3e97843e877653d46784eab601737573609e242f: Just one more offer! One more!
textByHashes.c09ea5465296542a85714b06c5c78396dd0195fd: Such a joy it is to be in this building.
textByHashes.8545061a8efe658c012eaa83bc5690b93e1ee06a: My people shall be so proud!
textByHashes.471d7c5bc9d2587c843cf31d009252d5c3c2c6b2: Hmmm. These numbers don't quite add up.
